metadata.job_summary: 12-month internship supporting Zinc Marketing operations team through full trade lifecycle.

research.company_mission: Largest producers and marketers of commodities
research.recent_news: Kazzinc opening metal sales to rival traders in 2026

resume.professional_summary: MSc Finance graduate with extensive operational M&A experience in lean, entrepreneurial environments across multiple sectors. At Glencore's Zinc Marketing Department, I will contribute process-oriented execution, stakeholder coordination, and analytical rigor to support trade lifecycle operations in commodities. Proven ability to thrive in flat organizational structures, delivering results across concurrent mandates while managing multicultural relationships in fast-paced settings.
auraia_bullets: Contributed to end-to-end deal execution in lean 3-person team (sourcing, valuation, due diligence, negotiations, closing), thriving in flat organizational structure with high individual responsibility

Managed relationships with clients, advisors, and counterparties across Europe, US, and Asia throughout transaction lifecycle, developing multicultural communication and stakeholder coordination in fast-paced environments

Led marketing materials production, maintained buyer universes, and coordinated data room management across 7 concurrent mandates, showcasing process-oriented approach and detail-focused execution under pressure
resume.rc_bullet: Prepared investment memos including market analysis, competitive positioning, and financial projections for 3 potential acquisitions (EUR 10M-30M revenues), demonstrating problem-solving skills and ability to synthesize complex information for decision-making
resume.europ_bullet: Built automated financial dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs and performed variance analysis on monthly P&L results for CHF 50M+ subsidiary, showcasing IT proficiency, process optimization mindset to maximize operational efficiency, and streamlined reporting workflows
leadership_bullets: Led AIESEC's post-COVID recovery by sourcing leads and negotiating partnerships, closing 3 deals generating CHF 60K revenue (+40% placements), demonstrating resilience
Founded Screeny.ai, an AI buyer identification tool adopted by 3 M&A firms, reducing search time from 10h+ to 20min, showcasing innovation and diverse task execution
Manage investment portfolio using options strategies (CSPs, CCs), generating CHF 5K+ premiums through analytical thinking and strategic decisions in markets
resume.courses: Corporate Governance and M&A, Data Science for Finance, Cross-Cultural Management
resume.skills: Financial Modeling | Data Analysis | Valuation | Process Optimization

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Zinc Marketing Department Intern Position
cover_letter.intro: Glencore's entrepreneurial value resonates with my M&A experience. The Kazzinc 2026 marketing model transformation presents an opportunity to contribute detail-focused execution to the Zinc Marketing team.
cover_letter.body_1: **Trade Lifecycle Operations** - As sole analyst in a 3-person M&A boutique, I thrived in a flat structure. Managing 7 mandates, I coordinated materials, databases, and logistics across Europe, US, and Asia.
cover_letter.body_2: **Problem-Solving Rigor** - At Europ Assistance, I built automated dashboards for CHF 50M+ operations. At RC Group, I prepared investment memos for acquisition targets.
cover_letter.body_3: **Resilience and Agility** - Leading AIESEC's post-COVID recovery, I closed 3 partnerships generating CHF 60K revenue. Founding Screeny.ai taught me to embrace diverse tasks.
cover_letter.closing: Glencore's commitment to decarbonization aligns with my values. I am excited to contribute my process-oriented mindset and resilient work ethic to the Zinc Marketing Department.

email.subject: Application - Zinc Marketing Intern - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Hiring Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Zinc Marketing Department Intern position at Glencore.

Your entrepreneurial culture presents an exciting opportunity. My experience coordinating 7 M&A mandates aligns with the operational rigor required.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
turionadrian@gmail.com
